findings.description: oidc_auto_login_attempted flag in sessionStorage is only cleared on successful OIDC callback (full-page flow). Explicit logout without a callback leaves the flag set, preventing auto-redirect on the next visit until the tab is closed. Consider clearing on logout.

oidcUrl.searchParams.set('dt', Date()) appends a human-readable date string to the OIDC redirect URL. Non-standard, intent unclear, and strict OIDC providers may reject unknown query params. Use Date.now() or remove if not required.
No frontend test covers the auto-redirect behavior. A unit test with mocked window.location would verify the oidcAutoLogin + auth_type === 'oidc' condition and sessionStorage loop-prevention guard.
Author noted backend Go tests were not run locally. CI should be confirmed green before merge, especially TestGetConfigIncludesOidcAutoLogin.
sessionStorage loop-prevention mechanism is well-conceived and correctly prevents infinite redirects when the user cancels at the IdP.
getLocale early-return on falsy locale and useState(i18n.language || 'en') initialization are genuine defensive improvements that stand on their own merits.
